title: Grid Event Signature Library (GSL) — ORNL
description: A curated, labelled library of electric power-system event signatures (voltage/current measurement signatures), developed by Oak Ridge and Lawrence Livermore National Laboratories and funded by the US Department of Energy to accelerate machine-learning and AI applications on grid data. Data is anonymised. EDiT links only; ORNL hosts the repository.

distribution.note: Free to access, but a valid email address is required: a 7-day access token is emailed to you (no usernames or passwords). Data is anonymised. Confirm reuse/citation terms with the project before redistributing. See the GSL user guide and FAQ for the full data dictionary.

variables: Labelled and tagged power-system event signatures (e.g. voltage/current measurement traces by event type). Full field list and event-tag taxonomy maintained upstream by ORNL — see the GSL user guide.
